zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Ferrers於1390年出生在英國戴文爾斯頓 費雷斯時，她的父親William Ferrers20歲，母親Elizabeth Matesford15歲。她於1409年7月16日與Richard Yard在英國英格蘭戴文爾斯頓 費雷斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭戴文牛頓 阿博特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Ferrers于1390年出生在英国戴文爾斯頓 費雷斯时，她的父亲William Ferrers20岁，母亲Elizabeth Matesford15岁。她于1409年7月16日与Richard Yard在英国英格兰戴文爾斯頓 費雷斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世在英国英格兰戴文牛頓 阿博特。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Ferrers was born in 1390, in Churston Ferrers, Devon, England, her father, William Ferrers, was 20 and her mother, Elizabeth Matesford, was 15. She married Richard Yard on 16 July 1409, in Churston Ferrers, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in Newton Abbot, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Richard Yard le 16 juillet 1409, à Churston Ferrers, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée à Newton Abbot, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Ferrersが1390年にイギリスデボンチャーストン フエレルズで生まれた時，父William Ferrersは20歳，母Elizabeth Matesfordは15歳であった。1409年7月16日にイギリスイギリスデボンチャーストン フエレルズでRichard Yardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスデボンニュートン アボットで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Ferrers(이)가 1390년 영국 데폰 c후르스턴 페레르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Ferrers(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Matesford(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1409년 7월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 c후르스턴 페레르스에서 Richard Yard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 뉴턴 애벗에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Ferrers родилась в 1390 г. в местности чурстон фиррирс, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Ferrers было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Matesford, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Yard 16 июля 1409 г. в местности чурстон фиррирс, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в местности нютон эббот, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
